name: Re-Score-Themis
description: Chấm và Update BXH bằng Themis
displayDescription: Automated scoring tool for the Themis Online Judge system. Reorganizes contestant submissions and regenerates scoring logs/leaderboards, saving Vietnamese competitive programming contest organizers from manual score tallying. Built as a C# console app that processes submission files and outputs structured results. Used by contest staff at Vietnamese informatics competitions.
